raw_input:
[3.0/5] Works, but feels a bit Greasy. The good Nice presentation. You apply this with a dropper my other half says it feels a bit greasy though she thinks it works which is the main objective on the other hand she wouldn't have me get this again. Draw your own conclusions, but I think there may be better options. [4.0/5] More than three oils This product of Korea comes in am attractive bottle and nice packaging. The listed ingredients constitute a lot more than "three blends of oil" so the description is misleading. Given this, I feel the current price point is somewhat inflated. It has a light, faint, pleasant scent. The consistency of the oil is thick but penetrates the skin without leaving it feeling greasy. I agree it is soothing but I personally don't see any benefit to using this on my face so I'll be using it on my body instead. [5.0/5] Soothes and Hydrates your Skin and Smells GREAT! I really like this blend of oils for your face and neck. It goes on nice and smooth and leaves my skin hydrated well. I love that all the ingredients are Natural, Vegan, as well as Cruelty free, all important to me! This blended oil Smells Really Good!

I really enjoy using products that have hemp seed oil and bergamot oil. The use of hemp seed oil in this product serves as a carrier oil as well as soothes and moisturizes your skin. Bergamot helps to calm your skin as well as acts as an anti-inflammatory agent. Holy Basil is also used in this blend of oils and helps improve your skins elasticity. All three of these ingredients work well in concert with each other.

Since this is an oil based skincare product, it’s best to apply at bedtime. Oil based products take longer to absorb into your skin, so nighttime/bedtime is the best to apply.

This product arrives in a nice frosted glass bottle with a built in dropper. You receive 1.01fl oz of the oil, It comes in a pretty white box. This would make a wonderful Christmas gift to any of your family members or a close friend.

I DO Recommend this product as it works really well. You wake with fresh hydrated skin that’s nice and calm and ready to take on all the challenges your day brings!

I Hope you find my Review Helpful, Thanks for Reading. [5.0/5] Superb Face Oil! [[VIDEOID:73ac59eea1d96ef33bb985189bf0b474]] This product is excellent for dry or cracked skin! It works very well to keep my face smooth and soft! I like using it at night and due to its size, it’s airplane safe! [4.0/5] Just kind of average I don't used to use skin-care products often. As a male, it's just not something I used to give much thought to. However, as I get older, I do suffer from dry skin in the winter months as the lower humidity in my house tends to cause my skin to flake and break out in spots.

So I thought I would try this vegan oil for dry skin and I'm not entirely impressed.

First thoughts are that the bottle is very nice. I love the green color of the oil. When the light hits it just right, it looks very pleasing. The bottle comes with a lid attached to a dropper for application, which makes it a little difficult to apply. You have to hold the dropper with one hand and apply it to the other and rub it in. My concern with this method is how difficult it will be to pull up more oil when the bottle gets low, but I guess that remains to be seen.

The oil itself is very greasy feeling. It literally feels like a lower viscosity motor oil and also has a sandy/gritty texture to it when applied. The scent is very strange as well. To me, it smells 100% like rubber. It's not a bad smell, but it's also not a pleasant smell. It's just a smell. If you've ever smelled rubber, you know what I mean.

As for its effectiveness? Again, not impressed.

I've been using it for about a week now, and I haven't really noticed any huge effects from the lotion. My skin is still peeling and dry in most of the places where I have applied this, but I would say there is a slight improvement. However, I'm not sure it's worth the price. I have used other, much cheaper, lotions/oils that have provided better results.

Overall, this is just average to me. I'm just not sure it's worth the price of admission. [4.0/5] Works well At first I thought it a little greasy feeling, but it ended up blending into my skin and leaving it nice and soft. Although it works well I have tried other brands that work better....it does work well, but I personally don't think it's something I would buy again for what it's priced at [5.0/5] Feels pretty good I apply this after showering and it does hydrate well. Feels good and is not oily. Smells nice as well. [5.0/5] Working great ! my partner and i tried this oil and it is working great, makes us feel happy and we use it everyday now as i was not a fan of facial oil, has very pure and great scents [5.0/5] Definitely has a scent suggesting hemp. Spreads nice but a little greasy. Beautiful product in beautiful packaging. I think it moisturizes well but leaves a greasy shine after application. Too greasy for my face, but I have used it on my dry hands and feet and love it. It does have a distinct scent, but not overpowering and doesn’t seem to linger too long. The greasy shine seems to fade quickly on my skin with the exception of my face. I didn’t get any irritation or I’ll side effects. [5.0/5] Soothing oil/serum Each of the isfrom blends seems to have a recommended time of day for usage. Greenery is to soothe you for a peaceful afternoon. Of course, it can be used anytime as needed
The concept behind this three-oil blend is to soothe body mind and soul, using Hemp seed oil to soothe the skin, Bergamot oil to soothe the mind and the visually calming green imparted by the Holy Basil oil to soothe the spirit.
The oil feels, silky, the fragrance is light and balanced, all three oils combining to create a mellow scent. The ingredients are natural, organic, and ecofriendly.
The directions encourage you to make this a moment. Specifically, after cleansing and toning, drop the oil into the palm, inhale to stimulate the senses and tap your skin gently until the oil is absorbed.
A few drops provided good coverage and after patting it in, took a little while to sink in. It never felt sticky, or heavy, just a light silky layer that once absorbed left my skin feeling soft and nourished.
The care taken in producing this is apparent, even to the presentation. This is a beautiful oil and the 1 oz bottle should last a long time. [4.0/5] Leaves Face Soft I got this for my wife to use on her face. She has used it for several days now and really likes the way it makes her face feel. She just uses a small amount and pats in in according to the directions. The only issue is that it leaves a greasy feel on her hands afterward. [3.0/5] Expensive Herbal Face Oil with Confusing Ingredients This is a higher priced Korean facial oil for dry skin and is touted as being made from Holy Basil, Hemp and Bergamot. The first thing I noticed was the ingredients list which placed the Hemp and Bergamot at #9 and #10 on the ingredient list which I found a bit misleading. It is a very small bottle so coverage is not great if you use it daily. My wife followed the directions and applied it sparingly to her face and it did rub in well with no greasy residue. After several days of use there was no difference in the feel, texture or dryness of the skin. This could be because of her mid 70's age or maybe it will take weeks for a change to appear. In any case, there are probably other products that might produce similar results at a better price point. [4.0/5] luxurious oil I was worried about the bergamot in this oil as that scent can be overpowering, however there ended up being surprisingly no scent at all. Some people with love that but personally I was dissapointed. What it lacks in scent this oil makes up for in quality. The oil goes on smoothly and absorbs into skin quickly. I love that even though I'm using an oily my skin doesnt feel oily. Rather it feels soft and moisturized. The bright green color ia interesting, the packaging makes this very giftable. I think I have fallen in love with this brand! [4.0/5] Pleasant and very mild This is a pleasant and very mild product. It has a barely discernible fragrance, despite containing a variety of oils and herbs. I applied it after shaving, and it was a nice soothing finish. [5.0/5] Moisture without leaving you oily! First off this product smells fantastic! It has a great dropper with a glass bead at the end that helps you control how much you're applying. I have and incredibly oily T zone, but also suffer from really dry cheeks and chin. I can apply this to my entire face and it doesn't leave me feeling greasy at all. It feels light on your skin and seems to help with the redness from breakouts. [5.0/5] Smells and feels great This smells and feels great. My skin feels hydrated and healthy. This is a must have for desert living! [5.0/5] Nice soothing oil Great on your skin to provide soothing properties. Easy to apply and gentle on your skin. Great product and results.

response:
Product oil blend get mixed reviews. Most say work good for dry skin, make face feel soft hydrated. Many complain greasy feeling, especially on face. Some use on body, hands, feet instead - work better there.

Smell divide people. Some love light pleasant scent. Others say smell like rubber, strange. Bergamot scent some find too faint, want stronger.

Packaging get praise from many. Come frosted glass bottle with dropper, nice white box. Green color look good. Some say dropper make application difficult, hard use when bottle get low.

Ingredients cause confusion. Hemp, bergamot, holy basil listed late in ingredient list, mislead buyers who think these main ingredients. Some say price too high for what get.

Best results come using at night, let absorb while sleep. Wake up with soft hydrated skin. Some say good for redness, breakouts, inflammation. Natural, vegan, cruelty-free matter to buyers who care about that.

Bottom line: work decent for dry skin but greasy on face. Better for body. Price maybe too high. Cheaper options maybe give same results.
